productDisplayName: Doodle Girl Little Princess Pink Tops
description: Composition Pink sleeveless top with a round neck, made of 100% cotton, with graphic print running from the right hem to the back left chest, bow at the right hem and patch loop at the back Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed Do not iron on print Let your little princess enjoy her play time in style with this stylish top from doodle. The graphic print adds an element of sweetness, while the cotton fabric keeps her fresh and comfortable all day. Pair this top with a shorts or skirts and sandals to complete her look.
